name: Correct2Compete
address: 10730 Bennett Pkwy Ext ste c, Zionsville, IN 46077
about: Correct2Compete is an indoor facility focused on improving golf and athletic performance through personalized programs and intentional practice. The venue utilizes technology like Flightscope launch monitors to provide shot-by-shot feedback during lessons and practice sessions, allowing players to identify and correct issues in real time. With an emphasis on coaching and discipline, the facility offers structured training plans, memberships, and access to three golf simulators designed to make practice more challenging than actual play, aiming for better results in less time.
why_golfers_like_it: Real-time shot feedback using Flightscope technology for immediate improvement
Personalized coaching programs tailored to individual goals and skill levels
Challenging practice environment with skills challenges and games to enhance on-course performance

food_and_drink.notes: No bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: All three simulators are connected with Flightscope Technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf equipment to use during simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is mentioned as being permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information about kid-friendly amenities or programs mentioned on the website.
